description: Create new foundation documentation files (INDEX.md, RELATIONSHIPS.md, EXPORTS.md, HOTSPOTS.md) and enhance existing docs (API.md, COMPONENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, SCHEMA.md) by leveraging data from .coderef/index.json, graph.json, and context.json. Build auto-generation pipeline to keep docs synchronized with codebase.
goal: Transform static foundation docs into living documentation that auto-populates from .coderef scan data, providing traceability, relationship maps, and complexity analysis for developers
requirements: Create INDEX.md as human-browsable element registry from index.json
Create RELATIONSHIPS.md visualizing dependency graphs from graph.json edges
Create EXPORTS.md documenting public API surface (781 exported elements)
Create HOTSPOTS.md merging complexity scores from context.json
Enhance API.md with live parameter tables from index.json
Enhance COMPONENTS.md with complexity badges and UUID links
Enhance ARCHITECTURE.md with Mermaid diagrams from graph.json
Create doc generation scripts (Node.js) for auto-regeneration
Add UUID anchor comments to markdown for traceability
Validate docs match index.json (CI gate script)

success_criteria.auto_generation: Scripts exist to regenerate all docs from .coderef data
success_criteria.ci_integration: Validation script passes/fails based on doc freshness
success_criteria.documentation_coverage: 100% of index.json elements discoverable via INDEX.md
success_criteria.enhancement: Existing 4 foundation docs updated with live data fields
success_criteria.traceability: Every documented element has UUID comment anchor
